name: Air Products & Chemicals, Inc
h1: Air Products & Chemicals's GCC footprint in India
lede: Air Products & Chemicals runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Vadodara, covering engineering & design, built over seventeen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Air Products & Chemicals office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.

about.description: Air Products & Chemicals's India footprint covers Pune and Vadodara, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fifteen decision-makers, in one profile.
